headline: Why State Street Corporation (STT) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does State Street (STT) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider State Street (STT) After Its Strong 1-Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether State Street at around US$154 still offers value, or if the recent excitement has already been priced in. The stock closed at US$154.02, with returns of 2.6% over 7 days, 25.7% over 30 days, 19.3% year to date, 80.8% over 1 year, 137.7% over 3 years and 113.4% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about what is driving these moves and how sustainable they might be. Recent headlines have focused on State Street's role as a major custodian bank and...
